𝐄𝐱𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞: 𝟓-𝟏𝟎 𝐘𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐬

𝐉𝐨𝐛 𝐒𝐮𝐦𝐦𝐚𝐫𝐲
We are looking for an AI/ML Engineer to develop, deploy, and optimize machine learning models and AI-powered applications.

𝐊𝐞𝐲 𝐑𝐞𝐬𝐩𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐢𝐛𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐞𝐬
Build and deploy Machine Learning models
Work on data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model training
Develop AI-based solutions like recommendation systems, NLP models, or predictive analytics
Integrate ML models into production systems
Monitor and optimize model performance
Collaborate with data engineers and developers

𝐑𝐞𝐪𝐮𝐢𝐫𝐞𝐝 𝐒𝐤𝐢𝐥𝐥𝐬
Strong programming in Python
Experience with ML libraries (Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch)
Knowledge of statistics & data analysis
Experience with NLP / Computer Vision (any one)
Understanding of model deployment (APIs, Flask, FastAPI)

𝐍𝐢𝐜𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐇𝐚𝐯𝐞
Experience with LLMs / Generative AI
Knowledge of MLOps tools (MLflow, Docker, Kubernetes)
Cloud experience (AWS SageMaker / Azure ML)

𝐀𝐩𝐩𝐥𝐲 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐂𝐕𝐬:- kashish@bizfy.in

extracted.full_content:
Dhruv Dagar

Talent Acquisition Specialist

Position: Data Scientist

📍 Location: Remote
🧑‍💻 Experience: 6+ Years


---

Role Overview

We are looking for an experienced Data Scientist to design, develop, and deploy advanced analytics and machine learning solutions. This role involves working on end-to-end data science projects, handling large datasets, and delivering impactful insights to drive business decisions.


---

Key Responsibilities

Design, develop, and deploy machine learning models and analytics solutions

Lead end-to-end data science projects from problem definition to production

Work with large and complex datasets to extract actionable insights

Collaborate with stakeholders to translate business needs into data solutions

Mentor junior team members and promote best practices

Build and optimize data pipelines and workflows

Present insights and model results to leadership teams

Ensure model scalability, performance, and reliability



---

Required Skills

Strong expertise in Python or R

Hands-on experience in Machine Learning, Statistical Modeling, and Predictive Analytics

Experience with libraries such as Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, and PyTorch

Strong knowledge of SQL and database management

Experience with data visualization tools (Tableau, Power BI, Matplotlib, Seaborn)

Good understanding of feature engineering, model tuning, and evaluation

Experience working with large-scale datasets



---

Preferred Skills

Experience with Big Data technologies (Hadoop, Spark)

Hands-on experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)

Knowledge of MLOps tools (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines)

Experience in Deep Learning, NLP, or Computer Vision

Familiarity with data engineering concepts



---

📩 Interested candidates? apply now🚀

Please share your updated resume on WhatsApp +91 72918 74076
or email at Forcecraver.aditya@gmail.com to discuss further

#DataScientist #MachineLearning #Hiring #RemoteJobs #Python #AI #JobsIndia

extracted.full_content:
Singam. Shiva Dhanush

Founder – RawEDIT | Performance-Driven Video Editing & Brand Growth Specialist

We’re Hiring (India Only) – Freelance | Contract | Remote | On-site

We’re building a strong team across AI, automation, content, marketing, and digital systems. This is not just random freelance work — we’re looking for people who want to do consistent, meaningful work and grow with us.

If you’re good at something, that’s enough. You don’t need to know everything. Just be clear about what you do.

Comment below in this format:
 Your Role | Your Skills | Your Level

Example:
 AI Automation | Zapier, APIs, WhatsApp Bots | Intermediate
 Video Editor | Reels, YouTube | Advanced
 Web Developer | Shopify, React | Beginner

We’re currently looking for people in AI & Automation (chatbots, workflows, CRM, APIs, WhatsApp systems), AI Voice Systems (voice bots, IVR, call automation), Web Development & Funnels (WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, full-stack, landing pages), Marketing & Growth (Meta Ads, Google Ads, SEO, performance marketing), Content Production (video editing, reels, YouTube, shoots, thumbnails), Branding & Design (logo, UI/UX, creatives, packaging), Sales & CRM (lead management, pipelines, conversion systems), Local Business Growth (Google Business, local SEO, review systems), and Consulting (audits, strategy, scaling).

We’re open to beginners who are serious, intermediates who can execute, and experts who can take ownership. What matters is clarity and intent.

Don’t comment “interested.” Tell me what you actually do. I’ll personally review and send the form to the right people.

Let’s build something real.

We’re open to beginners who are serious, intermediates who can execute, and experts who can take ownership. What matters is clarity and intent.

extracted.full_content:
Working as an HR

🚀 We’re Hiring: Technical Lead – Generative AI & Machine Learning
 📍 Ahmedabad | Work From Office Only
 💼 Full-Time | 5–9 Years Experience

Are you passionate about building cutting-edge Generative AI solutions and leading from the front? We are looking for a hands-on Technical Lead who can bridge strategy and execution — someone who codes, mentors, and innovates.

🔹 Role Highlights
 • Drive technical direction for AI/ML initiatives
 • Work closely with the CTO to translate vision into execution
 • Lead development of LLM-based systems, RAG pipelines, and agentic frameworks
 • Mentor engineers and foster a strong research-driven culture

🔹 Key Skills Required
 • Strong Python & system design fundamentals
 • Hands-on with LLMs (GPT, LLaMA, Mistral, Claude, etc.)
 • Experience with RAG, vector databases (FAISS, Pinecone, etc.)
 • Proficiency in PyTorch (preferred)
 • Experience with FastAPI/Flask, MLOps tools, and cloud platforms

🔹 What We’re Looking For
 • 5–9 years in AI/ML Engineering
 • Proven experience leading technical teams
 • Strong research mindset with ability to implement new ideas
 • Excellent communication & mentoring skills

✨ Why Join?
 • Work on cutting-edge AI problems
 • High-impact role with strategic ownership
 • Access to advanced compute (A100/H100 GPUs)
 • Learning-driven, innovation-focused environment

📩 Interested candidates can share their profiles or reach out directly on riya.menon@amulyaservices.com or connect us on +91 70967 67577

🚀 We’re Hiring: MLOps Engineer – Generative AI

📍 Location: Pan India

📌 Role Type: Contractual

🔹 Role Overview:
As an MLOps Engineer, you will bridge the gap between data science and production systems, ensuring seamless deployment, monitoring, and lifecycle management of ML models in real-world environments.

🔹 Experience Required:
• Total Experience: 8+ Years
• Relevant MLOps Experience: 5+ Years

🔹 Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain scalable ML pipelines
